items.title: Warren Buffett Sends a $382 Billion Warning to Wall Street. Are You Paying Attention?
items.author: Jennifer Saibil
items.description: Warren Buffett is accumulating record cash reserves of $382 billion, signaling caution in the current market. He suggests investors be selective, prepared for volatility, and ready to capitalize on rare investment opportunities.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Accumulating cash indicates market uncertainty but not pessimism about long-term investing
Accumulating cash indicates market uncertainty but not pessimism about long-term investing
Buffett invested when its price-to-earnings ratio fell below 10, indicating an attractive buying opportunity
Partially sold position but still considered a long-term holding
One of three stocks Buffett claims he would never sell
Another stock Buffett claims he would never sell
